The Linear Method

# Practices for building

There is a lost art of building true quality software. To bring back the right focus, here are the foundational ideas Linear is built on.

Introduction

1. [Principles & Practices1.1](https://linear.app/method/introduction)

Direction

1. [Set the product direction2.1](https://linear.app/method/product-direction)

4. [Scope projects down2.4](https://linear.app/method/scope-projects)

Building
